name: aceteam
description: Claude Code plugins for AceTeam.ai — AI agent management, workflow automation, and safety infrastructure

plugins.name: aceteam
plugins.description: Manage AI agents, knowledge bases, documents, and workbenches on AceTeam. Create, update, and chat with agents. Search knowledge bases and manage MCP server connections.

plugins.name: aceflows
plugins.description: Build and run agentic AI workflows on AceTeam. Create visual workflow graphs, browse node types, and execute automation pipelines — all from your terminal.

plugins.name: wengine
plugins.description: Skill for exploring, composing, validating, and running typed workflows via the wengine CLI from aceteam-workflow-engine.
